The Development

Where Luxury Meets
Everyday Living

Nestled in the prestigious heart of Kileleshwa, Gold Green Light Residences redefines contemporary urban living in Nairobi. Every detail — from the full-marble flooring and champagne-finish kitchen cabinetry to the private balconies and walk-in wardrobes — has been designed with an uncompromising commitment to quality.

Choose from elegant 2-bedroom and spacious 3-bedroom residences, all ensuite, with up to 4 private balconies offering sweeping views of the Nairobi skyline and lush neighbourhood greenery.

Whether you are seeking a family home, an investment property, or a premium rental, Gold Green Light Residences delivers European-standard construction, world-class amenities, and the security and serenity every homeowner deserves.

Request Brochure
Architectural Vision

Striking Architecture,
Timeless Design

A contemporary glass-and-terracotta facade rises above Kileleshwa's tree-lined streets. Stone-clad boundary walls, landscaped courtyards and glass balustrade balconies create an unmistakable presence.

Front Elevation — Kileleshwa
Compound & Entrance

Available Units

Choose Your
Residence

All units feature all-ensuite bedrooms, private balconies, built-in kitchen with modern cabinetry, walk-in wardrobes in master bedrooms, and premium marble flooring throughout. Units are available for both outright sale and monthly rental.
